        .checkbox {
            border: var(--border)solid var(--input-color,var(--color-base-content))

        @supports (color: color-mix(in lab,red,red)) {
            .checkbox {
                border:var(--border)solid var(--input-color,color-mix(in oklab,var(--color-base-content)20%,#0000))
            }
        }

        .checkbox {
            cursor: pointer;
            appearance: none;
            border-radius: var(--radius-selector);
            vertical-align: middle;
            color: var(--color-base-content);
            box-shadow: 0 1px oklch(0% 0 0/calc(var(--depth)*.1)) inset,0 0 #0000 inset,0 0 #0000;
            --size: calc(var(--size-selector,.25rem)*6);
            width: var(--size);
            height: var(--size);
            background-size: auto,calc(var(--noise)*100%);
            background-image: none,var(--fx-noise);
            flex-shrink: 0;
            padding: .25rem;
            transition: background-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;
            display: inline-block;
            position: relative
        }

        .checkbox:before {
            --tw-content: "";
            content: var(--tw-content);
            opacity: 0;
            clip-path: polygon(20% 100%,20% 80%,50% 80%,50% 80%,70% 80%,70% 100%);
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            box-shadow: 0 3px oklch(100% 0 0/calc(var(--depth)*.1)) inset;
            background-color: currentColor;
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: .75;
            transition: clip-path .3s .1s,opacity .1s .1s,rotate .3s .1s,translate .3s .1s;
            display: block;
            rotate: 45deg
        }

        .checkbox:focus-visible {
            outline: 2px solid var(--input-color,currentColor);
            outline-offset: 2px
        }

        .checkbox:checked,.checkbox[aria-checked=true] {
            background-color: var(--input-color,#0000);
            box-shadow: 0 0 #0000 inset,0 8px 0 -4px oklch(100% 0 0/calc(var(--depth)*.1)) inset,0 1px oklch(0% 0 0/calc(var(--depth)*.1))
        }

        :is(.checkbox:checked,.checkbox[aria-checked=true]): before {
            clip-path:polygon(20% 100%,20% 80%,50% 80%,50% 0%,70% 0%,70% 100%);
            opacity: 1

        @media(forced-colors:active) {
            :is(.checkbox:checked,.checkbox[aria-checked=true]):before {
                --tw-content: "✔︎";
                clip-path: none;
                background-color: #0000;
                rotate: none
            }
        }

## 完整文件路径与内容总结

吾已探索rich-editor目录结构，找到如下关键文件：

### 1. **Checkbox 节点与样式**

Checkbox使用 **Lexical 内置的 CheckListPlugin**，无需自定义节点。

**RichEditor 集成文件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx` (第115行)
  - 导入并使用 `CheckListPlugin` from `@lexical/react/LexicalCheckListPlugin`
  
**Theme 主题定义：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/theme.ts`
  - 定义CSS类名映射：
    - `checklist: 'rich-checklist'`
    - `listitemChecked: 'rich-list-item-checked'`
    - `listitemUnchecked: 'rich-list-item-unchecked'`

**样式实现：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts` (第227-279行)
  - `.rich-checklist` — 列表容器（`list-style: none`, `padding-left: 0`）
  - `.rich-list-item-checked / .rich-list-item-unchecked` — checkbox项（`padding-left: 1.9em`，相对定位）
  - `::before` 伪元素 — 16px边框方框，使用 `vars.color.border`，`border-radius: vars.borderRadius.sm`
  - `.rich-list-item-checked::before` — 填充 `vars.color.accent` 背景色
  - `.rich-list-item-checked::after` — 白色对勾（✓），使用 `border-left` 和 `border-bottom` 旋转实现
  - `.rich-list-item-checked` 文本 — 穿透线（`text-decoration: line-through`），颜色 `vars.color.textSecondary`

---

### 2. **Link 节点与渲染**

**Link 节点有两种：**

**a) Lexical 内置 LinkNode**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/shared.ts`
  - 导入自 `@lexical/link` 的 `LinkNode` 和 `AutoLinkNode`
  - 在 `NESTED_EDITOR_NODES` 中注册用于嵌套编辑器

**b) 自定义 LinkCardNode** （链接卡片装饰节点）
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/LinkCardNode.ts` (完整内容已读)
  - 继承 `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`
  - 属性：`url`, `source`, `id`, `title`, `description`, `favicon`, `image`
  - 导出函数：`$createLinkCardNode()`, `$isLinkCardNode()`
  - `decorate()` 返回 `LinkCardRenderer` 组件

**LinkCardRenderer 组件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/LinkCardRenderer.tsx` (完整内容已读)
  - 渲染为 `<a>` 标签，class `rich-link-card`
  - 可选显示图片、标题、favicon、描述、URL
  - 支持 `target="_blank"` 和 `rel="noopener noreferrer"`

**Theme 中的 Link 样式：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/theme.ts`
  - `link: 'rich-link'`

**Shared CSS 中的 Link 样式：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts` (第187-196行)
  - `.rich-link` — 颜色 `vars.color.link`，无下划线，hover时添加下划线

---

### 3. **编辑器整体结构**

**RichEditor 主组件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx` (完整内容已读)
  - 接受 props：`initialValue`, `onChange`, `variant`, `theme`, `placeholder`, `onSubmit`, `autoFocus`, `className`, `contentClassName`, `style`, `actions`, `onEditorReady`, `extraNodes`, `rendererConfig`, `imageUpload`, `debounceMs`, `children`
  - 节点配置：使用 `allEditNodes` from `config-edit.ts` + 可选 `extraNodes`
  - 核心插件：`ListPlugin`, `LinkPlugin`, `CheckListPlugin`, `TablePlugin`, `HistoryPlugin`, `MarkdownShortcutsPlugin`, `AlertPlugin`, `MermaidPlugin`, `KaTeXPlugin`, `ImagePlugin`, `ImageUploadPlugin`, `FootnotePlugin`, `HorizontalRulePlugin`, `BlockExitPlugin`, `AutoLinkPlugin`, `BlockIdPlugin`, `EditorRefPlugin`
  - 包装层次：`LexicalComposer` → `ColorSchemeProvider` → `RendererConfigProvider` → `ImageUploadProvider` → `FootnotePlugin` → 内容

**配置文件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts` (完整内容已读)
  - `builtinNodes` — 内置 Lexical 节点（Heading, Quote, List, Link, Table, Code等）
  - `customNodes` — 自定义节点（Spoiler, Mention, KaTeX, Image, Alert, CodeBlock, Footnote, Video, LinkCard, Details, Grid, Banner, Mermaid, Ruby）
  - `allNodes` = `builtinNodes` + `customNodes`

---

### 4. **useFaviconProbe Hook**

- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-link/Favicon.tsx` (完整内容已读)
  - **功能**：探测并加载网站 favicon
  - **参数**：`hostname: string | null`
  - **返回**：`{ faviconUrl: string | null, isLoading: boolean }`
  - **实现**：
    - 尝试加载 favicon 变体列表：`/favicon.ico`, `/favicon.png`, `/favicon.svg`, `/apple-touch-icon.png`, `/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png`
    - 使用 `new Image()` 检测URL有效性（`onload` / `onerror`）
    - 返回第一个成功加载的 favicon 或 null
    - 使用 `isCancelled` 标记处理cleanup
  - **FallbackFavicon**：加载失败时显示 globe icon（`i-mingcute-globe-line`）

---

 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-link/Favicon.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { BilibiliIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/BilibiliIcon'
     6→import { SimpleIconsFigma } from '~/components/icons/platform/FigmaIcon'
     7→import { GitHubBrandIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/GitHubBrandIcon'
     8→import { CibMozilla } from '~/components/icons/platform/Moz'
     9→import { VscodeIconsFileTypeNpm } from '~/components/icons/platform/NpmIcon'
    10→import { IcBaselineTelegram } from '~/components/icons/platform/Telegram'
    11→import { SimpleIconsThemoviedatabase } from '~/components/icons/platform/TheMovieDB'
    12→import { TwitterIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/Twitter'
    13→import { WikipediaIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/WikipediaIcon'
    14→import { SimpleIconsXiaohongshu } from '~/components/icons/platform/XiaoHongShuIcon'
    15→import { SimpleIconsZhihu } from '~/components/icons/platform/ZhihuIcon'
    16→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    17→import {
    18→  isBilibiliUrl,
    19→  isFigmaUrl,
    20→  isGithubUrl,
    21→  isMozillaUrl,
    22→  isNpmUrl,
    23→  isTelegramUrl,
    24→  isTMDBUrl,
    25→  isTwitterUrl,
    26→  isWikipediaUrl,
    27→  isXiaoHongShuUrl,
    28→  isZhihuUrl,
    29→} from '~/lib/link-parser'
    30→
    31→const FAVICON_VARIANTS = [
    32→  '/favicon.ico',
    33→  '/favicon.png',
    34→  '/favicon.svg',
    35→  '/apple-touch-icon.png',
    36→  '/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png',
    37→]
    38→
    39→const useFaviconProbe = (hostname: string | null) => {
    40→  const [faviconUrl, setFaviconUrl] = useState<string | null>(null)
    41→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  useEffect(() => {
    44→    if (!hostname) {
    45→      setFaviconUrl(null)
    46→      return
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    setIsLoading(true)
    50→    let isCancelled = false
    51→
    52→    const probeImage = (url: string): Promise<string | null> => {
    53→      return new Promise((resolve) => {
    54→        const img = new Image()
    55→        img.onload = () => resolve(url)
    56→        img.onerror = () => resolve(null)
    57→        img.src = url
    58→      })
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    const probeFavicons = async () => {
    62→      for (const variant of FAVICON_VARIANTS) {
    63→        if (isCancelled) break
    64→        const url = `https://${hostname}${variant}`
    65→        const result = await probeImage(url)
    66→        if (result && !isCancelled) {
    67→          setFaviconUrl(result)
    68→          setIsLoading(false)
    69→          return
    70→        }
    71→      }
    72→      if (!isCancelled) {
    73→        setFaviconUrl(null)
    74→        setIsLoading(false)
    75→      }
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    probeFavicons()
    79→
    80→    return () => {
    81→      isCancelled = true
    82→    }
    83→  }, [hostname])
    84→
    85→  return { faviconUrl, isLoading }
    86→}
    87→
    88→const map = [
    89→  {
    90→    type: 'GH',
    91→    icon: <GitHubBrandIcon className="text-[#1D2127] dark:text-[#FFFFFF]" />,
    92→    test: isGithubUrl,
    93→  },
    94→  {
    95→    type: 'TW',
    96→    icon: <TwitterIcon />,
    97→    test: isTwitterUrl,
    98→  },
    99→  {
   100→    type: 'TG',
   101→    icon: <IcBaselineTelegram className="text-[#2AABEE]" />,
   102→    test: isTelegramUrl,
   103→  },
   104→  {
   105→    type: 'BL',
   106→    icon: <BilibiliIcon className="text-[#469ECF]" />,
   107→    test: isBilibiliUrl,
   108→  },
   109→  {
   110→    type: 'ZH',
   111→    icon: <SimpleIconsZhihu className="text-[#0084FF]" />,
   112→    test: isZhihuUrl,
   113→  },
   114→  {
   115→    type: 'WI',
   116→    icon: <WikipediaIcon className="text-current" />,
   117→    test: isWikipediaUrl,
   118→  },
   119→  {
   120→    type: 'TMDB',
   121→    icon: (
   122→      <SimpleIconsThemoviedatabase className="text-[#0D243F] dark:text-[#5CB7D2]" />
   123→    ),
   124→    test: isTMDBUrl,
   125→  },
   126→  {
   127→    type: 'Moz',
   128→    icon: <CibMozilla className="text-[#8cb4ff]" />,
   129→    test: isMozillaUrl,
   130→  },
   131→  {
   132→    type: 'Npm',
   133→    icon: <VscodeIconsFileTypeNpm />,
   134→    test: isNpmUrl,
   135→  },
   136→  {
   137→    type: 'Figma',
   138→    icon: <SimpleIconsFigma className="text-[#A259FF]" />,
   139→    test: isFigmaUrl,
   140→  },
   141→  {
   142→    type: 'XHS',
   143→    icon: <SimpleIconsXiaohongshu className="text-[#FE2442]" />,
   144→    test: isXiaoHongShuUrl,
   145→  },
   146→] as const
   147→
   148→const type2IconMap = map.reduce(
   149→  (acc, cur) => {
   150→    acc[cur.type] = cur.icon
   151→    return acc
   152→  },
   153→  {} as Record<string, (typeof map)[number]['icon']>,
   154→)
   155→
   156→type AllType = (typeof map)[number]['type']
   157→const getUrlSource = (url: URL) => map.find((item) => item.test(url))?.type
   158→
   159→const getHostname = (href: string): string | null => {
   160→  try {
   161→    return new URL(href).hostname
   162→  } catch {
   163→    return null
   164→  }
   165→}
   166→
   167→type FaviconProps = (
   168→  | {
   169→      source: string
   170→    }
   171→  | {
   172→      href: string
   173→    }
   174→  | {
   175→      source: AllType
   176→    }
   177→) & {
   178→  noIcon?: boolean
   179→}
   180→
   181→const FallbackFavicon: Component<{ href?: string }> = ({ href, className }) => {
   182→  const hostname = href ? getHostname(href) : null
   183→  const { faviconUrl, isLoading } = useFaviconProbe(hostname)
   184→
   185→  if (isLoading) {
   186→    return null
   187→  }
   188→
   189→  if (faviconUrl) {
   190→    return (
   191→      <span
   192→        className={clsxm(
   193→          'mr-1 inline-flex shrink-0 items-center [&_img]:inline [&_img]:h-[0.9em]! [&_img]:w-[0.9em]!',
   194→          className,
   195→        )}
   196→      >
   197→        <img
   198→          src={faviconUrl}
   199→          alt=""
   200→          className="m-0! rounded-xs object-contain"
   201→        />
   202→      </span>
   203→    )
   204→  }
   205→
   206→  return (
   207→    <span
   208→      className={clsxm(
   209→        'mr-1 inline-flex shrink-0 [&_svg]:inline [&_svg]:h-[0.8em]!',
   210→        className,
   211→      )}
   212→    >
   213→      <i className="i-mingcute-globe-line" />
   214→    </span>
   215→  )
   216→}
   217→
   218→export const Favicon: Component<FaviconProps> = (props) => {
   219→  // @ts-expect-error
   220→  const { source, href, className, noIcon } = props
   221→
   222→  if (noIcon) return null
   223→
   224→  let nextSource = source as AllType
   225→  let parsedUrl: URL | null = null
   226→
   227→  try {
   228→    if (href) {
   229→      parsedUrl = new URL(href)
   230→      nextSource = getUrlSource(parsedUrl) ?? source
   231→    }
   232→  } catch {
   233→    /* empty */
   234→  }
   235→
   236→  if (type2IconMap[nextSource]) {
   237→    return (
   238→      <span
   239→        className={clsxm(
   240→          'mr-1 inline-flex shrink-0 [&_svg]:inline [&_svg]:h-[0.8em]!',
   241→          className,
   242→        )}
   243→      >
   244→        {type2IconMap[nextSource]}
   245→      </span>
   246→    )
   247→  }
   248→
   249→  return <FallbackFavicon href={href} className={className} />
   250→}
   251→
```

    40→
    41→export class LinkCardNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {

    44→  __id?: string
    45→  __title?: string

    52→      title: 'Link Card',

    58→        editor.update(() => {

    62→    },
    63→  ]
    64→
    65→  static getType(): string {

    89→    this.__title = payload.title

    93→  }
    94→

    99→  }
   100→
   101→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   102→    return false
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  isInline(): boolean {
   106→    return false
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedLinkCardNode): LinkCardNode {

   120→

   128→      title: this.__title,

   131→      image: this.__image,
   132→      version: 1,
   133→    }
   134→  }
   135→
   136→  getUrl(): string {
   137→    return this.getLatest().__url
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  setUrl(url: string): void {
   141→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   142→    writable.__url = url
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  getSource(): string | undefined {
   146→    return this.getLatest().__source
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  setSource(source: string | undefined): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    writable.__source = source
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  getId(): string | undefined {
   155→    return this.getLatest().__id
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  setId(id: string | undefined): void {
   159→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   160→    writable.__id = id
   161→  }
   162→
   163→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   164→    return createRendererDecoration('LinkCard', LinkCardRenderer, {

   167→      id: this.__id,
   168→      title: this.__title,

   182→export function $isLinkCardNode(

     1→export interface LinkCardRendererProps {
     2→  url: string
     3→  source?: string
     4→  id?: string
     5→  title?: string
     6→  description?: string
     7→  favicon?: string
     8→  image?: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function LinkCardRenderer({
    12→  url,
    13→  title,
    14→  description,
    15→  favicon,
    16→  image,
    17→}: LinkCardRendererProps) {
    18→  const displayTitle = title || url
    19→
    20→  return (
    21→    <a
    22→      className="rich-link-card"
    23→      href={url}
    24→      target="_blank"
    25→      rel="noopener noreferrer"
    26→    >
    27→      {image && (
    28→        <span className="rich-link-card-image">
    29→          <img src={image} alt="" loading="lazy" />
    30→        </span>
    31→      )}
    32→      <span className="rich-link-card-content">
    33→        <span className="rich-link-card-title">
    34→          {favicon && (
    35→            <img
    36→              className="rich-link-card-favicon"
    37→              src={favicon}
    38→              alt=""
    39→              width={16}
    40→              height={16}
    41→              onError={(e) => {
    42→                ;(e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none'
    43→              }}
    44→            />
    45→          )}
    46→          {displayTitle}
    47→        </span>
    48→        {description && (
    49→          <span className="rich-link-card-description">{description}</span>
    50→        )}
    51→        <span className="rich-link-card-url">{url}</span>
    52→      </span>
    53→    </a>
    54→  )
    55→}
    56→

     1→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     2→import { CheckListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalCheckListPlugin'
     3→import { LexicalComposer } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposer'
     4→import { LexicalErrorBoundary } from '@lexical/react/LexicalErrorBoundary'
     5→import { HistoryPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalHistoryPlugin'
     6→import { LinkPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalLinkPlugin'
     7→import { ListPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalListPlugin'
     8→import { RichTextPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalRichTextPlugin'
     9→import { TabIndentationPlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalTabIndentationPlugin'
    10→import { TablePlugin } from '@lexical/react/LexicalTablePlugin'
    11→
    12→import { allEditNodes } from '../config-edit'
    13→import { ColorSchemeProvider } from '../context/ColorSchemeContext'
    14→import { ImageUploadProvider } from '../context/ImageUploadContext'
    15→import { RendererConfigProvider } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
    16→import { setResolvedEditNodes } from '../node-registry'
    17→import { AlertPlugin } from '../plugins/AlertPlugin'
    18→import { AutoFocusPlugin } from '../plugins/AutoFocusPlugin'
    19→import { AutoLinkPlugin } from '../plugins/AutoLinkPlugin'
    20→import { BlockExitPlugin } from '../plugins/BlockExitPlugin'
    21→import { BlockIdPlugin } from '../plugins/BlockIdPlugin'
    22→import { EditorRefPlugin } from '../plugins/EditorRefPlugin'
    23→import { FootnotePlugin } from '../plugins/FootnotePlugin'
    24→import { HorizontalRulePlugin } from '../plugins/HorizontalRulePlugin'
    25→import { ImagePlugin } from '../plugins/ImagePlugin'
    26→import {
    27→  defaultImageUpload,
    28→  ImageUploadPlugin,
    29→} from '../plugins/ImageUploadPlugin'
    30→import { KaTeXPlugin } from '../plugins/KaTeXPlugin'
    31→import { MarkdownShortcutsPlugin } from '../plugins/MarkdownShortcutsPlugin'
    32→import { MermaidPlugin } from '../plugins/MermaidPlugin'
    33→import { OnChangePlugin } from '../plugins/OnChangePlugin'
    34→import { SubmitShortcutPlugin } from '../plugins/SubmitShortcutPlugin'
    35→import { editorTheme } from '../styles/theme'
    36→import type { RichEditorProps } from '../types'
    37→import { ContentEditable } from './ContentEditable'
    38→import { clsx, getVariantClass } from './utils'
    39→
    40→export function RichEditor({
    41→  initialValue,
    42→  onChange,
    43→  variant = 'article',
    44→  theme = 'light',
    45→  placeholder = 'Write something...',
    46→  onSubmit,
    47→  autoFocus = false,
    48→  className,
    49→  contentClassName,
    50→  style,
    51→  actions,
    52→  onEditorReady,
    53→  extraNodes,
    54→  rendererConfig,
    55→  imageUpload,
    56→  debounceMs,
    57→  children,
    58→}: RichEditorProps) {
    59→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allEditNodes, ...extraNodes] : allEditNodes
    60→  setResolvedEditNodes(nodes)
    61→  const initialConfig = {
    62→    namespace: 'RichEditor',
    63→    theme: editorTheme,
    64→    nodes,
    65→    editable: true,
    66→    onError: (error: Error) => {
    67→      console.error('[RichEditor]', error)
    68→    },
    69→    ...(initialValue ? { editorState: JSON.stringify(initialValue) } : {}),
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant)
    73→  const resolvedImageUpload = imageUpload ?? defaultImageUpload
    74→
    75→  return (
    76→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass} theme={theme}>
    77→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
    78→        <RendererConfigProvider
    79→          config={rendererConfig}
    80→          mode="editor"
    81→          variant={variant}
    82→        >
    83→          <ImageUploadProvider upload={resolvedImageUpload}>
    84→            <LexicalComposer initialConfig={initialConfig}>
    85→              <FootnotePlugin>
    86→                <div
    87→                  className={clsx('rich-editor', variantClass, className)}
    88→                  style={style}
    89→                  data-theme={theme}
    90→                  suppressHydrationWarning
    91→                >
    92→                  <RichTextPlugin
    93→                    contentEditable={
    94→                      <ContentEditable
    95→                        className={contentClassName}
    96→                        placeholder={placeholder}
    97→                      />
    98→                    }
    99→                    ErrorBoundary={LexicalErrorBoundary}
   100→                  />
   101→                  <HistoryPlugin />
   102→                  <ListPlugin />
   103→                  <LinkPlugin />
   104→                  <TabIndentationPlugin />
   105→                  <TablePlugin />
   106→                  <MarkdownShortcutsPlugin />
   107→                  <OnChangePlugin onChange={onChange} debounceMs={debounceMs} />
   108→                  <SubmitShortcutPlugin onSubmit={onSubmit} />
   109→                  <ImagePlugin />
   110→                  <ImageUploadPlugin onUpload={resolvedImageUpload} />
   111→                  <KaTeXPlugin />
   112→                  <AlertPlugin />
   113→                  <MermaidPlugin />
   114→                  <HorizontalRulePlugin />
   115→                  <CheckListPlugin />
   116→                  <BlockExitPlugin />
   117→                  <AutoLinkPlugin />
   118→                  <BlockIdPlugin />
   119→                  <EditorRefPlugin onEditorReady={onEditorReady} />
   120→                  {autoFocus && <AutoFocusPlugin />}
   121→                  {children}
   122→                  {actions && (
   123→                    <div className="rich-editor__actions">{actions}</div>
   124→                  )}
   125→                </div>
   126→              </FootnotePlugin>
   127→            </LexicalComposer>
   128→          </ImageUploadProvider>
   129→        </RendererConfigProvider>
   130→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   131→    </PortalThemeProvider>
   132→  )
   133→}
   134→
```

完美。现在总结一下找到的所有信息并响应用户。

## 完整文件路径与内容总结

吾已探索rich-editor目录结构，找到如下关键文件：

### 1. **Checkbox 节点与样式**

Checkbox使用 **Lexical 内置的 CheckListPlugin**，无需自定义节点。

**RichEditor 集成文件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx` (第115行)
  - 导入并使用 `CheckListPlugin` from `@lexical/react/LexicalCheckListPlugin`
  
**Theme 主题定义：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/theme.ts`
  - 定义CSS类名映射：
    - `checklist: 'rich-checklist'`
    - `listitemChecked: 'rich-list-item-checked'`
    - `listitemUnchecked: 'rich-list-item-unchecked'`

**样式实现：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts` (第227-279行)
  - `.rich-checklist` — 列表容器（`list-style: none`, `padding-left: 0`）
  - `.rich-list-item-checked / .rich-list-item-unchecked` — checkbox项（`padding-left: 1.9em`，相对定位）
  - `::before` 伪元素 — 16px边框方框，使用 `vars.color.border`，`border-radius: vars.borderRadius.sm`
  - `.rich-list-item-checked::before` — 填充 `vars.color.accent` 背景色
  - `.rich-list-item-checked::after` — 白色对勾（✓），使用 `border-left` 和 `border-bottom` 旋转实现
  - `.rich-list-item-checked` 文本 — 穿透线（`text-decoration: line-through`），颜色 `vars.color.textSecondary`

---

### 2. **Link 节点与渲染**

**Link 节点有两种：**

**a) Lexical 内置 LinkNode**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/shared.ts`
  - 导入自 `@lexical/link` 的 `LinkNode` 和 `AutoLinkNode`
  - 在 `NESTED_EDITOR_NODES` 中注册用于嵌套编辑器

**b) 自定义 LinkCardNode** （链接卡片装饰节点）
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/LinkCardNode.ts` (完整内容已读)
  - 继承 `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>`
  - 属性：`url`, `source`, `id`, `title`, `description`, `favicon`, `image`
  - 导出函数：`$createLinkCardNode()`, `$isLinkCardNode()`
  - `decorate()` 返回 `LinkCardRenderer` 组件

**LinkCardRenderer 组件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/LinkCardRenderer.tsx` (完整内容已读)
  - 渲染为 `<a>` 标签，class `rich-link-card`
  - 可选显示图片、标题、favicon、描述、URL
  - 支持 `target="_blank"` 和 `rel="noopener noreferrer"`

**Theme 中的 Link 样式：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/theme.ts`
  - `link: 'rich-link'`

**Shared CSS 中的 Link 样式：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/styles/shared.css.ts` (第187-196行)
  - `.rich-link` — 颜色 `vars.color.link`，无下划线，hover时添加下划线

---

### 3. **编辑器整体结构**

**RichEditor 主组件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/RichEditor.tsx` (完整内容已读)
  - 接受 props：`initialValue`, `onChange`, `variant`, `theme`, `placeholder`, `onSubmit`, `autoFocus`, `className`, `contentClassName`, `style`, `actions`, `onEditorReady`, `extraNodes`, `rendererConfig`, `imageUpload`, `debounceMs`, `children`
  - 节点配置：使用 `allEditNodes` from `config-edit.ts` + 可选 `extraNodes`
  - 核心插件：`ListPlugin`, `LinkPlugin`, `CheckListPlugin`, `TablePlugin`, `HistoryPlugin`, `MarkdownShortcutsPlugin`, `AlertPlugin`, `MermaidPlugin`, `KaTeXPlugin`, `ImagePlugin`, `ImageUploadPlugin`, `FootnotePlugin`, `HorizontalRulePlugin`, `BlockExitPlugin`, `AutoLinkPlugin`, `BlockIdPlugin`, `EditorRefPlugin`
  - 包装层次：`LexicalComposer` → `ColorSchemeProvider` → `RendererConfigProvider` → `ImageUploadProvider` → `FootnotePlugin` → 内容

**配置文件：**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts` (完整内容已读)
  - `builtinNodes` — 内置 Lexical 节点（Heading, Quote, List, Link, Table, Code等）
  - `customNodes` — 自定义节点（Spoiler, Mention, KaTeX, Image, Alert, CodeBlock, Footnote, Video, LinkCard, Details, Grid, Banner, Mermaid, Ruby）
  - `allNodes` = `builtinNodes` + `customNodes`

---

### 4. **useFaviconProbe Hook**

- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-link/Favicon.tsx` (完整内容已读)
  - **功能**：探测并加载网站 favicon
  - **参数**：`hostname: string | null`
  - **返回**：`{ faviconUrl: string | null, isLoading: boolean }`
  - **实现**：
    - 尝试加载 favicon 变体列表：`/favicon.ico`, `/favicon.png`, `/favicon.svg`, `/apple-touch-icon.png`, `/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png`
    - 使用 `new Image()` 检测URL有效性（`onload` / `onerror`）
    - 返回第一个成功加载的 favicon 或 null
    - 使用 `isCancelled` 标记处理cleanup
  - **FallbackFavicon**：加载失败时显示 globe icon（`i-mingcute-globe-line`）

---

吾已完成探索。所有文件路径均为绝对路径，内容已完整读取。

     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { BilibiliIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/BilibiliIcon'
     6→import { SimpleIconsFigma } from '~/components/icons/platform/FigmaIcon'
     7→import { GitHubBrandIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/GitHubBrandIcon'
     8→import { CibMozilla } from '~/components/icons/platform/Moz'
     9→import { VscodeIconsFileTypeNpm } from '~/components/icons/platform/NpmIcon'
    10→import { IcBaselineTelegram } from '~/components/icons/platform/Telegram'
    11→import { SimpleIconsThemoviedatabase } from '~/components/icons/platform/TheMovieDB'
    12→import { TwitterIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/Twitter'
    13→import { WikipediaIcon } from '~/components/icons/platform/WikipediaIcon'
    14→import { SimpleIconsXiaohongshu } from '~/components/icons/platform/XiaoHongShuIcon'
    15→import { SimpleIconsZhihu } from '~/components/icons/platform/ZhihuIcon'
    16→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    17→import {
    18→  isBilibiliUrl,
    19→  isFigmaUrl,
    20→  isGithubUrl,
    21→  isMozillaUrl,
    22→  isNpmUrl,
    23→  isTelegramUrl,
    24→  isTMDBUrl,
    25→  isTwitterUrl,
    26→  isWikipediaUrl,
    27→  isXiaoHongShuUrl,
    28→  isZhihuUrl,
    29→} from '~/lib/link-parser'
    30→
    31→const FAVICON_VARIANTS = [
    32→  '/favicon.ico',
    33→  '/favicon.png',
    34→  '/favicon.svg',
    35→  '/apple-touch-icon.png',
    36→  '/apple-touch-icon-precomposed.png',
    37→]
    38→
    39→const useFaviconProbe = (hostname: string | null) => {
    40→  const [faviconUrl, setFaviconUrl] = useState<string | null>(null)
    41→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  useEffect(() => {
    44→    if (!hostname) {
    45→      setFaviconUrl(null)
    46→      return
    47→    }
    48→
    49→    setIsLoading(true)
    50→    let isCancelled = false
    51→
    52→    const probeImage = (url: string): Promise<string | null> => {
    53→      return new Promise((resolve) => {
    54→        const img = new Image()
    55→        img.onload = () => resolve(url)
    56→        img.onerror = () => resolve(null)
    57→        img.src = url
    58→      })
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    const probeFavicons = async () => {
    62→      for (const variant of FAVICON_VARIANTS) {
    63→        if (isCancelled) break
    64→        const url = `https://${hostname}${variant}`
    65→        const result = await probeImage(url)
    66→        if (result && !isCancelled) {
    67→          setFaviconUrl(result)
    68→          setIsLoading(false)
    69→          return
    70→        }
    71→      }
    72→      if (!isCancelled) {
    73→        setFaviconUrl(null)
    74→        setIsLoading(false)
    75→      }
    76→    }
    77→
    78→    probeFavicons()
    79→
    80→    return () => {
    81→      isCancelled = true
    82→    }
    83→  }, [hostname])
    84→
    85→  return { faviconUrl, isLoading }
    86→}
    87→
    88→const map = [
    89→  {
    90→    type: 'GH',
    91→    icon: <GitHubBrandIcon className="text-[#1D2127] dark:text-[#FFFFFF]" />,
    92→    test: isGithubUrl,
    93→  },
    94→  {
    95→    type: 'TW',
    96→    icon: <TwitterIcon />,
    97→    test: isTwitterUrl,
    98→  },
    99→  {
   100→    type: 'TG',
   101→    icon: <IcBaselineTelegram className="text-[#2AABEE]" />,
   102→    test: isTelegramUrl,
   103→  },
   104→  {
   105→    type: 'BL',
   106→    icon: <BilibiliIcon className="text-[#469ECF]" />,
   107→    test: isBilibiliUrl,
   108→  },
   109→  {
   110→    type: 'ZH',
   111→    icon: <SimpleIconsZhihu className="text-[#0084FF]" />,
   112→    test: isZhihuUrl,
   113→  },
   114→  {
   115→    type: 'WI',
   116→    icon: <WikipediaIcon className="text-current" />,
   117→    test: isWikipediaUrl,
   118→  },
   119→  {
   120→    type: 'TMDB',
   121→    icon: (
   122→      <SimpleIconsThemoviedatabase className="text-[#0D243F] dark:text-[#5CB7D2]" />
   123→    ),
   124→    test: isTMDBUrl,
   125→  },
   126→  {
   127→    type: 'Moz',
   128→    icon: <CibMozilla className="text-[#8cb4ff]" />,
   129→    test: isMozillaUrl,
   130→  },
   131→  {
   132→    type: 'Npm',
   133→    icon: <VscodeIconsFileTypeNpm />,
   134→    test: isNpmUrl,
   135→  },
   136→  {
   137→    type: 'Figma',
   138→    icon: <SimpleIconsFigma className="text-[#A259FF]" />,
   139→    test: isFigmaUrl,
   140→  },
   141→  {
   142→    type: 'XHS',
   143→    icon: <SimpleIconsXiaohongshu className="text-[#FE2442]" />,
   144→    test: isXiaoHongShuUrl,
   145→  },
   146→] as const
   147→
   148→const type2IconMap = map.reduce(
   149→  (acc, cur) => {
   150→    acc[cur.type] = cur.icon
   151→    return acc
   152→  },
   153→  {} as Record<string, (typeof map)[number]['icon']>,
   154→)
   155→
   156→type AllType = (typeof map)[number]['type']
   157→const getUrlSource = (url: URL) => map.find((item) => item.test(url))?.type
   158→
   159→const getHostname = (href: string): string | null => {
   160→  try {
   161→    return new URL(href).hostname
   162→  } catch {
   163→    return null
   164→  }
   165→}
   166→
   167→type FaviconProps = (
   168→  | {
   169→      source: string
   170→    }
   171→  | {
   172→      href: string
   173→    }
   174→  | {
   175→      source: AllType
   176→    }
   177→) & {
   178→  noIcon?: boolean
   179→}
   180→
   181→const FallbackFavicon: Component<{ href?: string }> = ({ href, className }) => {
   182→  const hostname = href ? getHostname(href) : null
   183→  const { faviconUrl, isLoading } = useFaviconProbe(hostname)
   184→
   185→  if (isLoading) {
   186→    return null
   187→  }
   188→
   189→  if (faviconUrl) {
   190→    return (
   191→      <span
   192→        className={clsxm(
   193→          'mr-1 inline-flex shrink-0 items-center [&_img]:inline [&_img]:h-[0.9em]! [&_img]:w-[0.9em]!',
   194→          className,
   195→        )}
   196→      >
   197→        <img
   198→          src={faviconUrl}
   199→          alt=""
   200→          className="m-0! rounded-xs object-contain"
   201→        />
   202→      </span>
   203→    )
   204→  }
   205→
   206→  return (
   207→    <span
   208→      className={clsxm(
   209→        'mr-1 inline-flex shrink-0 [&_svg]:inline [&_svg]:h-[0.8em]!',
   210→        className,
   211→      )}
   212→    >
   213→      <i className="i-mingcute-globe-line" />
   214→    </span>
   215→  )
   216→}
   217→
   218→export const Favicon: Component<FaviconProps> = (props) => {
   219→  // @ts-expect-error
   220→  const { source, href, className, noIcon } = props
   221→
   222→  if (noIcon) return null
   223→
   224→  let nextSource = source as AllType
   225→  let parsedUrl: URL | null = null
   226→
   227→  try {
   228→    if (href) {
   229→      parsedUrl = new URL(href)
   230→      nextSource = getUrlSource(parsedUrl) ?? source
   231→    }
   232→  } catch {
   233→    /* empty */
   234→  }
   235→
   236→  if (type2IconMap[nextSource]) {
   237→    return (
   238→      <span
   239→        className={clsxm(
   240→          'mr-1 inline-flex shrink-0 [&_svg]:inline [&_svg]:h-[0.8em]!',
   241→          className,
   242→        )}
   243→      >
   244→        {type2IconMap[nextSource]}
   245→      </span>
   246→    )
   247→  }
   248→
   249→  return <FallbackFavicon href={href} className={className} />
   250→}
   251→
```

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report.

## Link Rendering Architecture: Rich Editor & Static Renderer

### Overview

Links in the Shiroi editor ecosystem use two distinct mechanisms:

1. **Inline links** — rendered as `<a>` tags via Lexical's `LinkNode` and `AutoLinkNode`
2. **Link card blocks** — custom `LinkCardNode` that displays rich link previews with favicon, title, description, and image

---

### 1. Inline Links

#### Editor Side (Rich Editor)

Links are handled by Lexical's built-in nodes, configured in `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts`:

```typescript
import { AutoLinkNode, LinkNode } from '@lexical/link'

export const builtinNodes = [
  LinkNode,
  AutoLinkNode,
  // ... other nodes
]
```

**Two link types:**

| Node Type | Source | Behavior |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| `LinkNode` | Lexical | Explicit inline links created by user (text + href) |
| `AutoLinkNode` | Lexical | Auto-detected URLs and email addresses |

**Auto-detection** via `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/AutoLinkPlugin.tsx`:

```typescript
// Matches URLs and emails automatically
const URL_REGEX = /https?:\/\/(?:www\.)?[-\w@:%.+~#=]{1,256}\.[a-zA-Z]{2}[-\w()@:%+.~#?&/=]*/
const EMAIL_REGEX = /(?:[\w.%+-]+@[a-z0-9.-]+\.[a-z]{2,})/i

export function AutoLinkPlugin({ matchers }: AutoLinkPluginProps) {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  useEffect(() => {
    return registerAutoLink(editor, {
      matchers: matchers ?? DEFAULT_MATCHERS,
      changeHandlers: [],
      excludeParents: [],
    })
  }, [editor, matchers])
  return null
}
```

#### Static Renderer Side

Links are rendered in `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx` (lines 111-134):

```typescript
case 'link':
  return (
    <a
      key={key}
      className="rich-link"
      href={node.url}
      target={node.target}
      rel={node.rel}
    >
      {children}
    </a>
  )

case 'autolink':
  return (
    <a
      key={key}
      className="rich-link"
      href={node.url}
      target="_blank"
      rel="noopener noreferrer"
    >
      {children}
    </a>
  )
```

**Key attributes:**
- Regular `link`: Uses stored `target` and `rel` attributes (respects user intent)
- `autolink`: Always opens in new tab with XSS protection (`rel="noopener noreferrer"`)

---

### 2. Link Cards (Block-Level Links)

Link cards are custom rich blocks displaying link previews.

#### Node Definition

File: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/LinkCardNode.ts`

**Class structure:**

```typescript
export class LinkCardNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
  __url: string
  __source?: string
  __id?: string
  __title?: string
  __description?: string
  __favicon?: string
  __image?: string

  static getType(): string {
    return 'link-card'
  }

  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    return createRendererDecoration('LinkCard', LinkCardRenderer, {
      url: this.__url,
      source: this.__source,
      id: this.__id,
      title: this.__title,
      description: this.__description,
      favicon: this.__favicon,
      image: this.__image,
    })
  }

  exportJSON(): SerializedLinkCardNode {
    return {
      ...super.exportJSON(),
      type: 'link-card',
      url: this.__url,
      source: this.__source,
      id: this.__id,
      title: this.__title,
      description: this.__description,
      favicon: this.__favicon,
      image: this.__image,
      version: 1,
    }
  }
}
```

**Pattern:** Uses the `DecoratorNode<ReactElement>` pattern with `createRendererDecoration()` helper (lines 163-173) to delegate rendering to a custom component while maintaining type safety.

#### Editor Rendering

File: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/components/renderers/LinkCardRenderer.tsx`

```typescript
export function LinkCardRenderer({
  url,
  title,
  description,
  favicon,
  image,
}: LinkCardRendererProps) {
  const displayTitle = title || url

  return (
    <a
      className="rich-link-card"
      href={url}
      target="_blank"
      rel="noopener noreferrer"
    >
      {image && (
        <span className="rich-link-card-image">
          <img src={image} alt="" loading="lazy" />
        </span>
      )}
      <span className="rich-link-card-content">
        <span className="rich-link-card-title">
          {favicon && (
            <img
              className="rich-link-card-favicon"
              src={favicon}
              alt=""
              width={16}
              height={16}
              onError={(e) => {
                ;(e.target as HTMLImageElement).style.display = 'none'
              }}
            />
          )}
          {displayTitle}
        </span>
        {description && (
          <span className="rich-link-card-description">{description}</span>
        )}
        <span className="rich-link-card-url">{url}</span>
      </span>
    </a>
  )
}
```

**Key features:**
- Favicon rendering with graceful fallback (hidden on load error)
- Image preview with lazy loading
- Fallback to URL if title missing
- Safe navigation with `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`

#### Static Renderer Rendering

The static renderer (`RichRenderer`) handles `link-card` nodes via the decoration pattern:

File: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/RichRenderer.tsx` (lines 95-105):

```typescript
if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
  try {
    const decoration = node.decorate(editor, editorConfig)
    if (decoration != null) {
      const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
      return applyBlockId(
        wrapDecoration(serialized, nodeKey, decoration),
        blockId,
        nodeKey,
      )
    }
  } catch {
    /* fallthrough to builtin */
  }
}
```

**Flow:**
1. Static renderer calls `node.decorate()` → returns `RendererWrapper` with `LinkCardRenderer`
2. `RendererWrapper` respects custom renderer injection via `RendererConfig` context
3. Falls back to default `LinkCardRenderer` if no override

---

### 3. DOM Decoration Pattern

**Reference pattern:** `HeadingAnchorPlugin` demonstrates post-render DOM manipulation.

File: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx`

```typescript
export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()

  useEffect(() => {
    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()

    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
      usedSlugs.clear()

      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue

        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
        if (!dom) continue

        const text = dom.textContent || ''
        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
        if (!baseSlug) continue

        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
        dom.id = slug

        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
          '.rich-heading-anchor',
        )
        if (!anchor) {
          anchor = document.createElement('a')
          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
          dom.prepend(anchor)
        }
        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
      }
    })
  }, [editor])

  return null
}
```

**Key techniques for DOM decoration:**
1. `editor.registerMutationListener(NodeType, handler)` — react to node mutations
2. `editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)` — get DOM element corresponding to node
3. DOM manipulation via standard `document.createElement()` and `querySelector()`
4. Apply IDs, classes, aria attributes

---

### 4. Configuration & Registration

#### Renderer Config Type

File: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/types/renderer-config.ts`

```typescript
export interface RendererConfig {
  LinkCard?: ComponentType<LinkCardRendererProps>
  // ... other renderers
}
```

#### Node Registry

File: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/config.ts`

```typescript
export const customNodes: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>> = [
  LinkCardNode,
  // ... other custom nodes
]

export const allNodes: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>> = [
  ...builtinNodes,  // LinkNode, AutoLinkNode included
  ...customNodes,   // LinkCardNode
]
```

#### Static Renderer Context

The `RichRenderer` injects renderer config via context (lines 250-254 of `RichRenderer.tsx`):

```typescript
<RendererConfigProvider
  config={rendererConfig}
  mode="renderer"
  variant={variant}
>
  {/* content */}
</RendererConfigProvider>
```

Allows runtime override of `LinkCardRenderer` via `rendererConfig` prop.

---

### 5. Rendering Flow Comparison

#### Editor Mode

```
LinkCardNode (with edit plugins)
  ↓
decorate() → createRendererDecoration('LinkCard', LinkCardRenderer, props)
  ↓
RendererWrapper (reads RendererConfig context)
  ↓
LinkCardRenderer (or custom override)
```

#### Static Renderer Mode

```
RichRenderer (headless editor created)
  ↓
LinkCardNode.decorate() → RendererWrapper
  ↓
RendererWrapper (reads RendererConfig context)
  ↓
LinkCardRenderer (or custom override)
```

Both modes use the **same node and renderer** because `LinkCardNode.decorate()` is context-agnostic. Bundle optimization comes from not importing edit-only dependencies in static mode.

---

### 6. Summary Table

| Aspect | Inline Links | Link Cards |
|--------|--------------|-----------|
| **Node** | `LinkNode`, `AutoLinkNode` (Lexical) | `LinkCardNode` (custom `DecoratorNode`) |
| **Editor Rendering** | Lexical's built-in link handling | `LinkCardRenderer` |
| **Static Rendering** | `case 'link'` in `renderBuiltinNode` | `node.decorate()` → `RendererWrapper` → `LinkCardRenderer` |
| **Output Element** | `<a href={url} ...>{children}</a>` | `<a className="rich-link-card" href={url} ...>{preview}</a>` |
| **Favicon Rendering** | N/A | `<img className="rich-link-card-favicon" onError={hide} />` |
| **DOM Decoration** | N/A (built-in) | Plugin pattern available (see `HeadingAnchorPlugin`) |
| **Custom Override** | Via Lexical (advanced) | Via `RendererConfig` context prop |

     9→      .trim()
    10→      // eslint-disable-next-line regexp/no-dupe-characters-character-class
    11→      .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    12→      .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    13→      .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    14→  )
    15→}
    16→
    17→function deduplicateSlug(slug: string, usedSlugs: Map<string, number>): string {
    18→  const count = usedSlugs.get(slug)
    19→  if (count === undefined) {
    20→    usedSlugs.set(slug, 1)
    21→    return slug
    22→  }
    23→  usedSlugs.set(slug, count + 1)
    24→  return `${slug}-${count}`
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
    28→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29→
    30→  useEffect(() => {
    31→    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    32→
    33→    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
    34→      usedSlugs.clear()
    35→
    36→      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
    37→        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
    38→
    39→        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
    40→        if (!dom) continue
    41→
    42→        const text = dom.textContent || ''
    43→        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    44→        if (!baseSlug) continue
    45→
    46→        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
    47→        dom.id = slug
    48→
    49→        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
    50→          '.rich-heading-anchor',
    51→        )
    52→        if (!anchor) {
    53→          anchor = document.createElement('a')
    54→          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
    55→          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
    56→          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
    57→          dom.prepend(anchor)
    58→        }
    59→        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
    60→      }
    61→    })
    62→  }, [editor])
    63→
    64→  return null
    65→}
    66→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import {
     2→  allNodes,
     3→  ColorSchemeProvider,
     4→  editorTheme,
     5→  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,
     6→  getVariantClass,
     7→  NestedContentRendererProvider,
     8→  RendererConfigProvider,
     9→} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
    10→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
    11→import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
    12→import type { LexicalEditor, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    13→import { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    14→import {
    15→  cloneElement,
    16→  createElement,
    17→  isValidElement,
    18→  type ReactNode,
    19→} from 'react'
    20→
    21→import { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
    22→import { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
    23→import { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
    24→import type { RichRendererProps } from './types'
    25→
    26→interface EditorConfig {
    27→  namespace: string
    28→  theme: Record<string, any>
    29→}
    30→
    31→function wrapDecoration(
    32→  serialized: any,
    33→  key: string,
    34→  decoration: ReactNode,
    35→): ReactNode {
    36→  switch (serialized.type) {
    37→    case 'alert-quote':
    38→      return createElement(
    39→        'div',
    40→        { key, className: `rich-alert rich-alert-${serialized.alertType}` },
    41→        decoration,
    42→      )
    43→    case 'banner':
    44→      return createElement(
    45→        'div',
    46→        { key, className: `rich-banner rich-banner-${serialized.bannerType}` },
    47→        decoration,
    48→      )
    49→    case 'grid-container':
    50→      return createElement(
    51→        'div',
    52→        { key, className: 'rich-grid-container' },
    53→        decoration,
    54→      )
    55→    default:
    56→      if (isValidElement(decoration)) {
    57→        return cloneElement(decoration, { key })
    58→      }
    59→      return decoration
    60→  }
    61→}
    62→
    63→function applyBlockId(
    64→  element: ReactNode,
    65→  blockId: string | undefined,
    66→  nodeKey: string,
    67→): ReactNode {
    68→  if (!blockId) return element
    69→
    70→  if (isValidElement(element) && typeof element.type === 'string') {
    71→    return cloneElement(element as any, { 'data-block-id': blockId } as any)
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  return (
    75→    <div
    76→      key={`${nodeKey}-block-anchor`}
    77→      className="rich-block-anchor"
    78→      data-block-id={blockId}
    79→    >
    80→      {element}
    81→    </div>
    82→  )
    83→}
    84→
    85→function renderTree(
    86→  node: any,
    87→  editor: LexicalEditor,
    88→  editorConfig: EditorConfig,
    89→  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    90→  key: string,
    91→  blockId?: string,
    92→): ReactNode {
    93→  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key
    94→
    95→  if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
    96→    try {
    97→      const decoration = node.decorate(editor, editorConfig)
    98→      if (decoration != null) {
    99→        const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
   100→        return applyBlockId(
   101→          wrapDecoration(serialized, nodeKey, decoration),
   102→          blockId,
   103→          nodeKey,
   104→        )
   105→      }
   106→    } catch {
   107→      /* fallthrough to builtin */
   108→    }
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
   112→
   113→  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
   114→    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
   115→  }
   116→
   117→  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
   118→  if (node.getChildren) {
   119→    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
   120→    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
   121→      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
   122→        renderTree(
   123→          child,
   124→          editor,
   125→          editorConfig,
   126→          headingSlugs,
   127→          `${nodeKey}-${i}`,
   128→        ),
   129→      )
   130→    }
   131→  }
   132→
   133→  return applyBlockId(
   134→    renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs),
   135→    blockId,
   136→    nodeKey,
   137→  )
   138→}
   139→
   140→function renderEditorToReact(
   141→  value: SerializedEditorState,
   142→  nodes: any[],
   143→): {
   144→  content: ReactNode
   145→  footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>
   146→  renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode
   147→} {
   148→  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
   149→    nodes,
   150→    theme: editorTheme,
   151→    editable: false,
   152→    onError: (error: Error) => {
   153→      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
   154→    },
   155→  })
   156→
   157→  const editorConfig: EditorConfig = { namespace: 'ssr', theme: editorTheme }
   158→
   159→  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
   160→  editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   161→
   162→  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
   163→
   164→  const rawRootChildren = (value as any).root?.children as any[] | undefined
   165→
   166→  let content: ReactNode = null
   167→  editorState.read(() => {
   168→    const root = $getRoot()
   169→    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
   170→    const children = root
   171→      .getChildren()
   172→      .map((child: any, i: number) =>
   173→        renderTree(
   174→          child,
   175→          editor,
   176→          editorConfig,
   177→          headingSlugs,
   178→          `ssr-${i}`,
   179→          rawRootChildren?.[i]?.$?.blockId,
   180→        ),
   181→      )
   182→    content = <>{children}</>
   183→  })
   184→
   185→  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
   186→    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
   187→      nodes,
   188→      theme: editorTheme,
   189→      editable: false,
   190→      onError: (error: Error) => {
   191→        console.error('[RichRenderer:nested]', error)
   192→      },
   193→    })
   194→    const nestedEditorConfig: EditorConfig = {
   195→      namespace: 'ssr-nested',
   196→      theme: editorTheme,
   197→    }
   198→    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
   199→    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
   200→    let nested: ReactNode = null
   201→    const nestedRawChildren = (state as any).root?.children as any[] | undefined
   202→    nestedState.read(() => {
   203→      const root = $getRoot()
   204→      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
   205→      const ch = root
   206→        .getChildren()
   207→        .map((child: any, i: number) =>
   208→          renderTree(
   209→            child,
   210→            nestedEditor,
   211→            nestedEditorConfig,
   212→            headingSlugs,
   213→            `nested-${i}`,
   214→            nestedRawChildren?.[i]?.$?.blockId,
   215→          ),
   216→        )
   217→      nested = <>{ch}</>
   218→    })
   219→    return nested
   220→  }
   221→
   222→  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
   223→}
   224→
   225→export function RichRenderer({
   226→  value,
   227→  variant = 'article',
   228→  theme = 'light',
   229→  className,
   230→  style,
   231→  as: Component = 'div',
   232→  rendererConfig,
   233→  extraNodes,
   234→}: RichRendererProps) {
   235→  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant)
   236→  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
   237→
   238→  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(
   239→    value,
   240→    nodes,
   241→  )
   242→
   243→  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className]
   244→    .filter(Boolean)
   245→    .join(' ')
   246→
   247→  return (
   248→    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass} theme={theme}>
   249→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
   250→        <RendererConfigProvider
   251→          config={rendererConfig}
   252→          mode="renderer"
   253→          variant={variant}
   254→        >
   255→          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
   256→            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
   257→            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
   258→          >
   259→            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
   260→              <Component
   261→                className={classes}
   262→                style={style}
   263→                data-theme={theme}
   264→                suppressHydrationWarning
   265→              >
   266→                {content}
   267→              </Component>
   268→            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
   269→          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
   270→        </RendererConfigProvider>
   271→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   272→    </PortalThemeProvider>
   273→  )
   274→}
   275→

     1→import { RendererWrapper, RubyRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
     2→import { createElement, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import * as tableStyles from '../table.css'
     5→
     6→function textToSlug(text: string): string {
     7→  return text
     8→    .toLowerCase()
     9→    .trim()
    10→    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    11→    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    12→    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    13→}
    14→
    15→function extractText(node: any): string {
    16→  if (node.text) return node.text
    17→  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    18→  return ''
    19→}
    20→
    21→export function renderBuiltinNode(
    22→  node: any,
    23→  key: string,
    24→  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    25→  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    26→): ReactNode {
    27→  switch (node.type) {
    28→    case 'root':
    29→      return <>{children}</>
    30→    case 'paragraph': {
    31→      const align = node.format
    32→        ? ({ textAlign: node.format } as const)
    33→        : undefined
    34→      return (
    35→        <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>
    36→          {children}
    37→        </p>
    38→      )
    39→    }
    40→    case 'heading': {
    41→      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    42→      const text = extractText(node)
    43→      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    44→      let slug = baseSlug
    45→      if (baseSlug) {
    46→        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    47→        if (count !== undefined) {
    48→          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    49→          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    50→        } else {
    51→          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    52→        }
    53→      }
    54→      return (
    55→        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    56→          {slug && (
    57→            <a
    58→              className="rich-heading-anchor"
    59→              aria-hidden="true"
    60→              tabIndex={-1}
    61→              href={`#${slug}`}
    62→            />
    63→          )}
    64→          {children}
    65→        </Tag>
    66→      )
    67→    }
    68→    case 'quote':
    69→      return (
    70→        <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">
    71→          {children}
    72→        </blockquote>
    73→      )
    74→    case 'list': {
    75→      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    76→      const cls =
    77→        node.listType === 'number'
    78→          ? 'rich-list-ol'
    79→          : node.listType === 'check'
    80→            ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul'
    81→            : 'rich-list-ul'
    82→      return (
    83→        <Tag
    84→          key={key}
    85→          className={cls}
    86→          start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}
    87→        >
    88→          {children}
    89→        </Tag>
    90→      )
    91→    }
    92→    case 'listitem': {
    93→      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    94→      const hasNestedList = node.children?.some((c: any) => c.type === 'list')
    95→      let cls: string
    96→      if (hasNestedList) {
    97→        cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
    98→      } else if (isChecklist) {
    99→        cls = node.checked
   100→          ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
   101→          : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   102→      } else {
   103→        cls = 'rich-list-item'
   104→      }
   105→      return (
   106→        <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>
   107→          {children}
   108→        </li>
   109→      )
   110→    }
   111→    case 'link':
   112→      return (
   113→        <a
   114→          key={key}
   115→          className="rich-link"
   116→          href={node.url}
   117→          target={node.target}
   118→          rel={node.rel}
   119→        >
   120→          {children}
   121→        </a>
   122→      )
   123→    case 'autolink':
   124→      return (
   125→        <a
   126→          key={key}
   127→          className="rich-link"
   128→          href={node.url}
   129→          target="_blank"
   130→          rel="noopener noreferrer"
   131→        >
   132→          {children}
   133→        </a>
   134→      )
   135→    case 'horizontalrule':
   136→      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
   137→    case 'table':
   138→      return (
   139→        <div key={key} className={tableStyles.tableWrapper}>
   140→          <table className={tableStyles.table}>{children}</table>
   141→        </div>
   142→      )
   143→    case 'tablerow':
   144→      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
   145→    case 'tablecell': {
   146→      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
   147→      const cls = node.headerState
   148→        ? tableStyles.tableHead
   149→        : tableStyles.tableCell
   150→      return (
   151→        <CellTag
   152→          key={key}
   153→          className={cls}
   154→          colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}
   155→        >
   156→          {children}
   157→        </CellTag>
   158→      )
   159→    }
   160→    case 'details': {
   161→      const summary = node.summary || ''
   162→      return (
   163→        <details
   164→          key={key}
   165→          className="rich-details"
   166→          open={node.open || undefined}
   167→        >
   168→          <summary className="rich-details-summary">
   169→            <span className="rich-details-summary-text">{summary}</span>
   170→            <span className="rich-details-chevron">
   171→              <svg
   172→                width="20"
   173→                height="20"
   174→                viewBox="0 0 20 20"
   175→                fill="none"
   176→                stroke="currentColor"
   177→                strokeWidth="1.5"
   178→                strokeLinecap="round"
   179→                strokeLinejoin="round"
   180→              >
   181→                <path d="M6 8L10 12L14 8" />
   182→              </svg>
   183→            </span>
   184→          </summary>
   185→          <div className="rich-details-content">{children}</div>
   186→        </details>
   187→      )
   188→    }
   189→    case 'spoiler':
   190→      return (
   191→        <span key={key} className="rich-spoiler" role="button" tabIndex={0}>
   192→          {children}
   193→        </span>
   194→      )
   195→    case 'ruby':
   196→      return createElement(RendererWrapper as any, {
   197→        key,
   198→        rendererKey: 'Ruby',
   199→        defaultRenderer: RubyRenderer,
   200→        props: {
   201→          reading: node.reading ?? '',
   202→          children,
   203→        },
   204→      })
   205→    case 'code':
   206→      return (
   207→        <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block">
   208→          <code>{children}</code>
   209→        </pre>
   210→      )
   211→    case 'code-highlight':
   212→      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
   213→    case 'linebreak':
   214→      return <br key={key} />
   215→    case 'tab':
   216→      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
   217→    default:
   218→      return null
   219→  }
   220→}
   221→

    31→export interface LinkCardNodePayload {

    35→  title?: string
    36→  description?: string
    37→  favicon?: string
    38→  image?: string

    40→
    41→export class LinkCardNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    42→  __url: string
    43→  __source?: string
    44→  __id?: string
    45→  __title?: string
    46→  __description?: string
    47→  __favicon?: string
    48→  __image?: string
    49→
    50→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    51→    {
    52→      title: 'Link Card',
    53→      icon: createElement(Link, { size: 20 }),
    54→      description: 'Link preview card',
    55→      keywords: ['link', 'card', 'bookmark', 'embed'],
    56→      section: 'MEDIA',
    57→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    58→        editor.update(() => {
    59→          $insertNodes([$createLinkCardNode({ url: '' })])
    60→        })
    61→      },
    62→    },
    63→  ]
    64→
    65→  static getType(): string {
    66→    return 'link-card'
    67→  }
    68→
    69→  static clone(node: LinkCardNode): LinkCardNode {
    70→    return new LinkCardNode(
    71→      {
    72→        url: node.__url,
    73→        source: node.__source,
    74→        id: node.__id,
    75→        title: node.__title,
    76→        description: node.__description,
    77→        favicon: node.__favicon,
    78→        image: node.__image,
    79→      },
    80→      node.__key,
    81→    )
    82→  }
    83→
    84→  constructor(payload: LinkCardNodePayload, key?: NodeKey) {
    85→    super(key)
    86→    this.__url = payload.url
    87→    this.__source = payload.source
    88→    this.__id = payload.id
    89→    this.__title = payload.title
    90→    this.__description = payload.description
    91→    this.__favicon = payload.favicon
    92→    this.__image = payload.image
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    96→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    97→    div.className = 'rich-link-card-wrapper'
    98→    return div
    99→  }
   100→
   101→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   102→    return false
   103→  }
   104→
   105→  isInline(): boolean {
   106→    return false
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedLinkCardNode): LinkCardNode {
   110→    return $createLinkCardNode({
   111→      url: serializedNode.url,
   112→      source: serializedNode.source,
   113→      id: serializedNode.id,
   114→      title: serializedNode.title,
   115→      description: serializedNode.description,
   116→      favicon: serializedNode.favicon,
   117→      image: serializedNode.image,
   118→    })
   119→  }
   120→
   121→  exportJSON(): SerializedLinkCardNode {
   122→    return {
   123→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   124→      type: 'link-card',
   125→      url: this.__url,
   126→      source: this.__source,
   127→      id: this.__id,
   128→      title: this.__title,
   129→      description: this.__description,
   130→      favicon: this.__favicon,
   131→      image: this.__image,
   132→      version: 1,
   133→    }
   134→  }
   135→
   136→  getUrl(): string {
   137→    return this.getLatest().__url
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  setUrl(url: string): void {
   141→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   142→    writable.__url = url
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  getSource(): string | undefined {
   146→    return this.getLatest().__source
   147→  }
   148→
   149→  setSource(source: string | undefined): void {
   150→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   151→    writable.__source = source
   152→  }
   153→
   154→  getId(): string | undefined {
   155→    return this.getLatest().__id
   156→  }
   157→
   158→  setId(id: string | undefined): void {
   159→    const writable = this.getWritable()
   160→    writable.__id = id
   161→  }
   162→
   163→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
   164→    return createRendererDecoration('LinkCard', LinkCardRenderer, {
   165→      url: this.__url,
   166→      source: this.__source,
   167→      id: this.__id,
   168→      title: this.__title,
   169→      description: this.__description,
   170→      favicon: this.__favicon,
   171→      image: this.__image,
   172→    })
   173→  }
   174→}
   175→
   176→export function $createLinkCardNode(
   177→  payload: LinkCardNodePayload,
   178→): LinkCardNode {
   179→  return new LinkCardNode(payload)
   180→}
   181→
   182→export function $isLinkCardNode(
   183→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
   184→): node is LinkCardNode {
   185→  return node instanceof LinkCardNode
   186→}

     1→import type { ComponentType, ReactElement } from 'react'
     2→import { createElement } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { useRendererConfig } from '../context/RendererConfigContext'
     5→import type { RendererConfig } from '../types/renderer-config'
     6→
     7→export type RendererKey = keyof RendererConfig
     8→
     9→type RendererPropsByKey = {
    10→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]> extends ComponentType<
    11→    infer P extends object
    12→  >
    13→    ? P
    14→    : never
    15→}
    16→
    17→type RendererComponentByKey = {
    18→  [K in RendererKey]-?: NonNullable<
    19→    RendererConfig[K]
    20→  > extends ComponentType<any>
    21→    ? NonNullable<RendererConfig[K]>
    22→    : never
    23→}
    24→
    25→export type RendererWrapperProps = {
    26→  [K in RendererKey]-?: {
    27→    /** Name of the renderer in RendererConfig */
    28→    rendererKey: K
    29→    /** Default renderer component */
    30→    defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K]
    31→    /** Props to pass to the renderer */
    32→    props: RendererPropsByKey[K]
    33→  }
    34→}[RendererKey]
    35→
    36→/**
    37→ * Wrapper component that allows overriding default renderers with custom ones.
    38→ * Uses RendererConfig from context to determine which renderer to use.
    39→ */
    40→export function RendererWrapper({
    41→  rendererKey,
    42→  defaultRenderer: DefaultRenderer,
    43→  props,
    44→}: RendererWrapperProps) {
    45→  const config = useRendererConfig()
    46→  const Renderer: ComponentType<any> = config?.[rendererKey] ?? DefaultRenderer
    47→
    48→  return <Renderer {...props} />
    49→}
    50→
    51→/**
    52→ * Type-safe helper for creating RendererWrapper elements from .ts node files.
    53→ * Avoids the createElement + discriminated-union typing limitation.
    54→ */
    55→export function createRendererDecoration<K extends RendererKey>(
    56→  rendererKey: K,
    57→  defaultRenderer: RendererComponentByKey[K],
    58→  props: RendererPropsByKey[K],
    59→): ReactElement {
    60→  return createElement(RendererWrapper, {
    61→    rendererKey,
    62→    defaultRenderer,
    63→    props,
    64→  } as RendererWrapperProps)
    65→}
    66→
